source: Wittgenstein Centre for Demography and Global Human Capital — Human Capital Data Explorer, SSP2 (Middle-of-the-Road) scenario projections, 2025–2035
method: Working-age population (20–64) educational attainment projection by ISCED level, SSP2 scenario.

GH.narrative: By 2035, an estimated 27% of working-age Ghanaians are projected to have post-secondary education (Wittgenstein Centre, SSP2) — up from ~18% in 2025.

AM.narrative: By 2035, an estimated 55% of working-age Armenians are projected to have post-secondary education (Wittgenstein Centre, SSP2) — up from ~43% in 2025.

DEFAULT.narrative: Working-age post-secondary attainment is projected to rise ~10 pp by 2035 (Wittgenstein Centre, SSP2).
